/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/MandelbrotRenderer.dir/src/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MandelbrotRenderer.dir/src/window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MandelbrotRenderer.dir/src/cuda/buffer.cu.o CMakeFiles/MandelbrotRenderer.dir/src/cuda/common.cu.o CMakeFiles/MandelbrotRenderer.dir/src/mandelbrot/reference.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MandelbrotRenderer.dir/src/mandelbrot/student.cu.o CMakeFiles/MandelbrotRenderer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MandelbrotRenderer.dir/extern/gl3w/gl3w.c.o CMakeFiles/MandelbrotRenderer.dir/extern/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MandelbrotRenderer.dir/extern/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MandelbrotRenderer.dir/extern/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MandelbrotRenderer.dir/extern/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MandelbrotRenderer.dir/extern/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MandelbrotRenderer.dir/extern/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_sdl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MandelbrotRenderer.dir/extern/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MandelbrotRenderer.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o bin/MandelbrotRenderer   -L/usr/local/cuda-13.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-13.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,"/home/thibault/Documents/Etude/Master Informatique/S8/GPGPU/TP2/TP2-Ex1-Mandelbrot-Renderer-20260309/out/bin" bin/libSDL2-2.0.so.0.2500.0 extern/SDL2/libSDL2main.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
